response.step_by_step_log: I identified the character as Gawr Gura and the event as her 'Graduation 3D Mini Live' based on the video context. The song she sings at 01:22 is her farewell song, 'Otsu-same'. I searched for 'Gawr Gura Otsu-same lyrics' to confirm the title and availability of lyrics, but found they are more of a catchphrase/closing remark for her streams rather than a fully produced lyrical song with standardized lyrics. Therefore, I will set the lyrics fields to null. The video transitions from her speech/performance into a post-concert animation.
response.global_summary: This is a 3D mini-live performance by VTuber Gawr Gura as part of her graduation event. The video features her delivering a farewell message and performing a song, 'Otsu-same', as an ending to her final livestream.

scenes.description: Gawr Gura stands on a stage and delivers a farewell message to her viewers, before singing her final song, 'Otsu-same'.
Post-concert scene showing Gura in her room, interacting with virtual items, ending with a view of the sea and the 'Graduation Mini Live' logo.
